short_desc: Content that sells or trades illegal drugs.
long_desc: Do not allow posts that offer, request, broker, or coordinate illegal drug sales. This includes price lists, delivery details, payment instructions, and direct contact for deals.

severity_guidance.1: Mentions drugs in a neutral context, no sale intent.
severity_guidance.2: Suggests buying or selling but details are limited.
severity_guidance.3: Clear sales intent with contact, price, quantity, or delivery details.

examples_allow: I am in recovery from opioid use and sharing my story.
News report: police seized meth during a traffic stop.
examples_remove: DM me for coke, same-day drop, cash only.
Selling oxy pills tonight, menu and prices in inbox.

short_desc: Content that encourages or organizes violence.
long_desc: Do not allow posts that call for physical harm, revenge attacks, or organized violent action against people or groups. Plans, targets, and timing increase severity.

severity_guidance.1: Angry language but no direct call to harm.
severity_guidance.2: Implied threat or encouragement to hurt someone.
severity_guidance.3: Explicit call, plan, or coordination for violent acts.

examples_allow: Violence is never the answer; report the incident instead.
Self-defense classes can help people feel safer.
examples_remove: Bring bats at 8 PM and smash anyone from that block.
Find him after work and beat him until he stops talking.

short_desc: Content with gore or explicit injury details.
long_desc: Do not allow posts that show or describe extreme gore, dismemberment, or severe bodily injury in a shocking way. Educational or medical context may lower severity.

severity_guidance.1: Mild injury mention without graphic detail.
severity_guidance.2: Disturbing injury detail but not extreme gore.
severity_guidance.3: Explicit gore, dismemberment, or intense blood focus.

examples_allow: CW: minor sports injury photo with no blood shown.
Medical article discussing trauma care in general terms.
examples_remove: Close-up video of a mutilated body with blood everywhere.
Photo thread showing severed limbs after the crash.

long_desc: Do not allow clear spam, including repeated posts, fake giveaways, mass unsolicited promotions, and deceptive links meant to farm clicks or money.

severity_guidance.1: Low-quality promo but limited reach and not deceptive.
severity_guidance.2: Repeated unsolicited promotion or suspicious claims.
severity_guidance.3: High-volume spam or clear scam with deceptive links.

examples_allow: We launched a new notebook today: example.com
One post announcing a local event ticket page.
examples_remove: WIN $$$ NOW!!! Click this link 10 times and share everywhere.
Same crypto referral post copied across every comment thread.

short_desc: Content targeting people with abuse or hate.
long_desc: Do not allow slurs, dehumanizing language, or targeted harassment against protected groups or individuals. Repeated attacks, threats, or humiliating dogpiles increase severity.

severity_guidance.1: Rude tone without slurs or protected-group targeting.
severity_guidance.2: Targeted insult or degrading language toward a person/group.
severity_guidance.3: Severe hate speech, slurs, or coordinated harassment.

examples_allow: We should challenge hateful ideas without attacking people.
Research paper on the impact of online harassment.
examples_remove: Those people are animals and should be pushed out.
Everyone pile on this user and make her quit the platform.
